description: It's femininty celebrated and enhanced with this pair of heeled sandals from Inc. 5. With it's sleek design and simple style, this pair is a perfect party wear. This pair comes with a shoe bag that helps you carry it around in ease. Upper Synthetic leather footbed with intertwined leather straps along the length of the foot, with a buckled back strap for absolute comfort and style Outsole Non-slip outsole for absolute grip even on smooth surfaces Sandal care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
